## Summary

Describe the change and the reason for it.

## Scope

- [ ] User-facing behavior
- [ ] Content
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling or automation
- [ ] Build, CI, or deployment
- [ ] Performance or maintenance

## Verification

List the commands, tests, screenshots, or manual checks you ran.

```text
pnpm check
pnpm build
```

## Notes

Mention follow-up work, screenshots, known risks, or intentionally skipped checks.
